body.title: Move 25 cc_skills/* into agent_datacenter/skills/ master, drop the cc_skills copies
body.result: Migrated 25 cc_skills/* trees to agent_datacenter/skills/ master (commits TheIgors@2e883e5a + agent_datacenter@5e5b8d7 + chase 96abd02e). Pre-commit rsync hook retired. Edit flow inverted: edit in agent_datacenter, agentctl skills deploy pushes to ~/.claude/skills/ on each box. map-igor + readigor stay TheIgors-internal. Verified byte-identical reconstitution. install_igor_linux.sh updated to install from new master.
body.description:
Companion to T-skills-master-home-in-datacenter (which shipped the mechanism). Move the actual skill content (25 machine-agnostic SKILL.md trees) from TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/ into agent_datacenter/skills/, then run `agentctl skills deploy` to populate ~/.claude/skills/ from the new master. Verify deploy is no-op-equivalent vs the old in-place files. Delete the migrated cc_skills/* trees so master is unambiguous. Keep map-igor and readigor in cc_skills/ since they're TheIgors-internal.

**Affected files:** /home/akien/dev/src/agent_datacenter/skills/<25 dirs> (NEW); /home/akien/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/<25 dirs> (DELETE after migrate); pre-commit hook SKILLS_DST may need a path update if it references cc_skills explicitly.

**Design rules:** ship-clean (no aliasing shims after the move).

**Scope boundary:** IN — copy 25 skills to master, run deploy, verify, delete cc_skills copies, fix any pre-commit hook references. OUT — adding new skills, changing skill content, Windows deploy backend.

**Test plan:** (1) git diff of ~/.claude/skills/ before/after migrate+deploy is empty (deploy reproduces the previous state byte-for-byte); (2) `agentctl skills deploy` reports 25 deployed, 2 untouched-local (map-igor, readigor); (3) full pytest suite still passes; (4) pre-commit hook still syncs correctly if it touches cc_skills.
